text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Mejiro Ryan have come
to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the Twinkle Series continues. As for our next
goal...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, how was my time on that lap?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Really?! It's great to see my new plank exercises
showing some results!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm doing good! At this rate, my next
goal should be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan has won two Grand Prix races in the same
year. I wonder what her next dream will be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, wanna know what it is? It might be a little
surprising.
choice_data_list: It's that big of a dream?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't know whether it's big or not... It's
unexpected more than anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've conquered the Takarazuka Kinen and the
Arima Kinen Grand Prix. My next goal is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
To beat the record time for a 2,200-meter turf
race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beating the record time... That really is heading in
a different direction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking a lot about what's at the heart
of everything I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And I realized that it's speed. I train to gain good
times. That's how I win and make a name for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I get treated like a star because I can run fast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Without speed, I'd be nothing. So I don't want to
forget what's most important for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need to break the record! I'll train
every day and strengthen my core, even if it's just
to get a tenth of a second faster!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...I never wanna stop getting faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan has changed. But at the same time, she's
very much the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll never stop working out, regardless of her
mental state. That alone might be her greatest
strength.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, watch me during this homestretch! I'm
gonna blast straight through to the finish!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And next time I'll do even better! I'll do it faster
and better than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan will never stop running toward
becoming the world's fastest athlete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I'll continue to support her as she pursues her
new dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, and romance! I gotta get to that ASAP.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right... We can't forget her other important
dream.
